ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1602. Maggiolo suggests that we should identify this person with Giovanni Maria Tarsia, chaplain to the family of Vittorio and Bianca Cappello in Venice.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
